description: CompositionPurple shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest, branding on the pocket, stitch detailing and a curved hemlineFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe stitch detailing and clever cut of this striped shirt from basics adds a touch of style, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
